name: altruon-merchant-demo
description: Public reference integration of the Altruon SDK: a branded SaaS subscription checkout (MySaas) with a minimal Node backend that keeps your Altruon secret key server-side.

scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
